column.name: description
column.value: 对齐现网页面“开票管理”的实时固定报表，直接读取 a_invoice_info 与 a_invoice_item 的开票、回款与账期信息。

update.column: { "params":[ {"name":"projectId","type":"string","label":"项目点"}, {"name":"status","type":"select","label":"状态","options":[ {"label":"审核中","value":"1"}, {"label":"待开票","value":"2"}, {"label":"待领取","value":"3"}, {"label":"待回款","value":"4"}, {"label":"已结束","value":"10"}, {"label":"已驳回","value":"20"}, {"label":"已作废","value":"-1"} ]}, {"name":"billType","type":"select","label":"类型","options":[ {"label":"租摆账单","value":"1"}, {"label":"销售账单","value":"2"}, {"label":"个人销售账单","value":"3"}, {"label":"预收","value":"4"} ]}, {"name":"code","type":"string","label":"单号"}, {"name":"itemTitle","type":"string","label":"账期/销售单号"}, {"name":"applyUserId","type":"string","label":"发起人"}, {"name":"applyStartTime","type":"date","label":"申请开始日期"}, {"name":"applyEndTime","type":"date","label":"申请结束日期"}, {"name":"invoiceStartTime","type":"date","label":"开票开始日期"}, {"name":"invoiceEndTime","type":"date","label":"开票结束日期"} ] }
